Title: Update Missing patched on the Megan,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7 computers
Notes:
Worked on the approved patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the missing/failed updates for the systems Megan & DESKTOP-I7G1MM7.

Downloaded and manually installed the applicable updates, including:

  • TeamViewer 15 (15.75.4)

  • Update for Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) (145.0.3800.82)

  • 2026-02 Cumulative Update Preview for Windows 11 Version 25H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5077241) (26200.7922)

Completed the installation process and verified the updated application and OS build versions on both systems.

Performed a post-installation scan to confirm compliance. All previously missing/failed patches are now successfully installed and reflecting compliant status in the ManageEngine console.

Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for AAVA:- Sophos Firewall
Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the AAVA:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,MEGAN
Notes:
Review the Manage Engine portal and found BUS-CENTER-PC,DESKTOP-I7G1MM7,DESKTOP-N6E84SS,MEGAN machine showing offline in Manage Engine Portal 
and were having grey out status. So connected to the machines. Checked and restart the Manage Engine services.
But nothing happened. So removed the agent  and installed the updated version (11.5.2600.19.W) in the machine.
 After that refresh the manage engine portal. Now the machines are showing online. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Missing patch while last run Bus-Center-PC & DESKTOP-N6E84SS
Notes:
reviewed the missing patches from the ManageEngine portal for the machine Bus-Center-PC and  DESKTOP-N6E84SS downloaded the failed patches for manual installation. Some patches previously failed because certain files were in use during installation, and a few patches were not applicable due to compatibility constraints.

The following patches were successfully installed:

  • Update for AspNet Core (x64) (8.0.25) (KB5081277)

  • Update for .NET Desktop Runtime (x64) (8.0.25) (KB5081277)

  • Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel for x64 2602 of version (19725.20172)

After installation, the computer was scanned again from the ManageEngine portal to clear the high vulnerabilities. The scan completed successfully and confirmed that the previously missing patches have now been updated.

Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches Megan, DESKTOP-I7G1MM7
Notes:
Logged in to the ManageEngine portal to identify systems with missing patches. The affected system DESKTOP-I7G1MM7 and Megan computers  was found to have pending updates.

Identified missing patches and proceeded with manual remediation. Downloaded and installed the required updates:

  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 146.0.7680.153 / 146.0.7680.154
  • Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise (Current Channel, x64) – Version 2602 (Build 19725.20190)

Performed a manual patch scan on the system to verify successful installation and to clear the pending patch status.

Post verification, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities are present on the system.
